message:
test(fcp-async-core): add tokio compat context inheritance tests

Add two tests verifying tokio compatibility layer context propagation:
spawned_task_inherits_tokio_compat_context (async task can access
Handle::try_current and spawn nested tokio tasks) and
runtime_block_on_enters_tokio_compat_context (sync block_on provides
the same). No production code changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
